title: IriUniverse Two — STQC Certified Dual Iris Scanner | BioEnable
tone: BioEnable corporate — problem-solution narrative (match E-Gate video style)

scenes.narration: National identity programs connect millions of citizens to essential services. But high-volume enrollment creates immense pressure on accuracy, speed, and security — impacting every operator and every person in the queue.
Slow manual capture leads to frustration, rework, and rejected images. For border-grade identity programs, that is a vulnerability we cannot afford. It is time for a smarter, faster way to enroll.
BioEnable introduces IriUniverse Two — our STQC certified dual iris scanner built for Aadhaar enrollment and large-scale biometric programs.

Enrollment is intuitive. Subjects position themselves with minimal guidance. Our binocular design captures both irises in under one second — with automatic detection, quality checks, and liveness detection built in.

We protect every enrollment with standards you can trust. Images meet ISO nineteen seven ninety-four dash six. IP sixty-five rugged design. Eye-safe operation. Compliant with ANSI, NIST, and ISO interchange formats.
Experience faster enrollment camps. Contactless dual-iris capture that works in real lighting conditions — on Windows, Linux, and Android, with SDK support for integrators.
The benefits are clear. Higher throughput, superior image quality, and enrollment your operators can run from day one — for voter ID, national programs, and large-scale identity projects.
Redefine your enrollment potential. Partner with BioEnable. Request your demo at bioenabletech.com.

acceptance_criteria: Follows problem-solution narrative like E-Gate reference video
